summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Coin des Étudiants premium multi-page site completed. Core functionality working well with navigation, team layout, listings, and WhatsApp integration. Found content configuration issues with stats harmonization and page title.

design_issues.issue: Stats not harmonized as required - showing 2,304+ instead of 6000+, 192+ instead of 500+, etc.
Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Coin des Étudiants' brand title

content_issues.issue: Contact page missing form elements - 0 form elements detected

passed_tests: WhatsApp floating button on all pages
Hero section with badges and CTAs
Navigation to all pages (Logements, Dons, Offres, Équipe, Contact)
Team page: 3 members with same size cards
Team page: Cheikh IBRA NDIAYE centered with Fondateur badge
Offres page: 14 listings with 4 tabs functionality
Footer with social icons and WhatsApp CTA

action_item_for_main_agent.stats_harmonization: Update STATS constant in /app/frontend/src/config/constants.js to show harmonized numbers (6000+, 500+, 150+, 200+)
action_item_for_main_agent.page_title: Update page title in HTML template or React Helmet to show 'Coin des Étudiants' instead of 'Emergent | Fullstack App'
action_item_for_main_agent.contact_form: Add contact form with validation on Contact page - currently showing 0 form elements

success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, minor content/config fixes needed
